paper_title: Offline Reinforcement Learning as One Big Sequence Modeling Problem

raw_extraction.innovation: Frames offline reinforcement learning as a sequence modeling problem using a Transformer decoder architecture, repurposing beam search for planning. Jointly models states, actions, and rewards as discrete tokens without assuming Gaussian dynamics.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Offline trajectory datasets (specific datasets not named in abstract/content)
raw_extraction.parameters: null (architecture details provided but no explicit parameter count)
raw_extraction.application: Offline RL, imitation learning, goal-conditioned RL, long-horizon planning, model-based control
raw_extraction.research_problem: Offline reinforcement learning, long-horizon dynamic prediction, imitation learning, goal-conditioned RL, and sparse-reward tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Discretization schemes (Uniform and Quantile) for continuous states/actions into tokens, enabling joint modeling of states, actions, and rewards as a stream of data
raw_extraction.paper_title: Offline Reinforcement Learning as One Big Sequence Modeling Problem

raw_extraction.innovation: Unifies offline reinforcement learning, imitation learning, and goal-reaching into a single sequence modeling framework by jointly predicting states, actions, and rewards using a Transformer decoder. The model avoids Markovian assumptions and predicts entire trajectories without requiring explicit policy access.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Datasets collected by trained humanoid/expert policies (e.g., D4RL offline benchmark suite, custom humanoid environments)
raw_extraction.application: Offline reinforcement learning, imitation learning, goal-reaching, trajectory prediction, model-based control
raw_extraction.license: Not explicitly stated (likely open-source based on libraries used)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Unified sequence modeling for offline reinforcement learning, imitation learning, and goal-reaching tasks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Beam-search-based planning for offline RL, imitation learning, goal-reaching
raw_extraction.extension: Discretization schemes (uniform and quantile) for handling continuous state/action spaces within a standard Transformer architecture
raw_extraction.paper_title: Offline Reinforcement Learning as One Big Sequence Modeling Problem
